Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT baseline."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(baseline.weight) AS units_count, sum(baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__baseline", sum(upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade", sum((coalesce(baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0) - coalesce(upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0)) * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__savings", sum(baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__baseline", sum(upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__upgrade", sum((coalesce(baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0) - coalesce(upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh", 0)) * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh__savings" 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade = 0) AS baseline JOIN (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade ON baseline.bldg_id = upgrade.bldg_id AND baseline."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = upgrade."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND baseline.state = upgrade.state AND upgrade.upgrade = 1 AND upgrade.applicability = true 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND baseline.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/ad48d522d2d16a95f9ea901abb625609533cd5f138114a27a44f53b9583b5166/01ed8f96-84e4-44aa-8de3-e58d153305d8/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
